Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a floating status overlay showing MyTweak ON/DISABLED and Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. Click the overlay lines to toggle.
Changelog: v1.0.5.8: Dancer dance-step presses now mirror under Performance Mode — a cheap fallback pulses the lowest copy of the pressed button when the icon hook is off, so steps on Cascade/Reverse Cascade/Fountain/Fountain Fall pulse with every press (no per-slot combo resolution, so all other pulses are unaffected). v1.0.5.7: hotfix reverting the 1.0.5.6 change that broke action pulses. v1.0.5.5: add Next Action Tracker window (/mytweak tracker). v1.0.5.4: Performance Mode fully disables the hotbar icon-swap hook so icons stay native; combos still resolve on button press.
